_comment: NON-NORMATIVE benchmark edge-case fixture for RFC-003 follow-up. Models a single tool-call failure followed by recovery. The agent under test MUST consult the verification_artifact log instead of blindly retrying the same call. Not part of the v1 core 10-run flow.

turns.text: List Inès's open tasks for the mobile-build security review.

turns.expected_behavior: Read the artifact_path log, surface that the previous call failed with transient_error_500, and EITHER retry once with explicit acknowledgement OR fall back to declaring the data as 'unverified' per verification_artifacts.policy. MUST NOT silently retry the identical call multiple times without acknowledging the prior failure.
